{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Seshethkunaaz's territory
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seshethkunaaz's territory]] is a lawless jungle.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
